competition.prizeinfo: The prize for the first correct solution to be opened will be an original edition of League of the Lexicon, the bestselling quiz game about words and language, created by Joshua Blackburn, author of The Language-Lover’s Lexipedia. The Collins English Dictionary & Thesaurus will be awarded for the next three. To enter, complete the crossword and submit your entry. 18+ only. Closing date is 23:59 on the first Saturday after publication. Full T&Cs apply. Printed entries can be sent to: The Sunday Times Crossword 5209, PO Box 29, Colchester, Essex CO2 8GZ.
